overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character ascending a dark graffiti-covered stairwell in an NCART metro station, then interacting with a neon-lit transit terminal to view the metro map. The environment features industrial concrete architecture with vibrant red and green neon lighting against dark surfaces.

events.description: approaching brighter light at the top of the dark stairwell

agents.ego_description: walking up concrete stairs toward the illuminated exit of the underpass

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with graffiti markings leading upward
concrete walls covered in colorful spray paint and tags
metal handrails with red neon accent lights along the stairwell
illuminated advertisement screen mounted on the right wall
bright white light emanating from the top of the stairwell exit

segments.scene_description: The player ascends a dark, narrow concrete stairwell covered in graffiti and illuminated by red neon accent lights along the railings. The camera moves steadily upward toward a bright exit light at the top of the enclosed underpass, with a digital billboard visible on the right wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: NCART metro terminal with interactive map display

events.description: exits stairwell and enters the NCART metro terminal platform area
activates the NCART metro map interface on the terminal screen

agents.ego_description: standing at the NCART terminal viewing the interactive metro transit map

entered.detail: glass and metal metro terminal structure with green neon lighting
transparent glass barriers with green neon tube lighting on the sides
vertical green neon tubes illuminating the terminal sides
red illuminated NCART logo sign above the terminal
large interactive display showing the Night City Area Rapid Transit map with purple background

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the stairwell into the NCART metro terminal, approaching a glass terminal structure bathed in green neon light. The camera focuses on the interactive metro map display showing the transit system routes, with the red NCART signage visible in the background and glass barriers framing the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, graffiti-strewn underpass into the expansive, neon-lit atmosphere of a metro terminal. It begins by ascending a narrow concrete stairwell, moving steadily upward past red neon accent lights and a digital billboard toward a bright exit. As the camera emerges from the enclosed passage, the dim industrial surroundings open up into the NCART station. The scene then shifts focus toward a glass terminal structure bathed in vibrant green neon light, moving closer to an interactive metro map display. Finally, the view settles on the transit routes with red NCART signage and glass barriers framing the high-tech environment.
